regular.name: ScoutingPFJetRecluster2_dijet_deltaR_ak8_max
regular.formula: max(deltaR(ak4[0] + ak4[1], ak8[0]), deltaR(ak4[0] + ak4[1], ak8[1]))

regular.name: ScoutingPFJetRecluster2_dijet_deltaR_ak8_min
regular.formula: min(deltaR(ak4[0] + ak4[1], ak8[0]), deltaR(ak4[0] + ak4[1], ak8[1]))

regular.name: SelectedLepton_passVetoID
regular.formula: (ScoutingElectron_pt > -90 && ((abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) < 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0126 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00463 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.148 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.209 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 2) || (abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) >= 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0457 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00814 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.19 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.132 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 3))) || (ScoutingMuonVtx_pt > -90 && (ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2)) || (ScoutingMuonNoVtx_pt > -90 && (ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2))

regular.name: nVetoIDElectron
regular.formula: sum(ele, (abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) < 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0126 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00463 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.148 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.209 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 2) || (abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) >= 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0457 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00814 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.19 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.132 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 3))

regular.name: nVetoIDMuon
regular.formula: sum(mu_vtx, ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2) + sum(mu_novtx, ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2)

regular.name: nVetoIsoMuon
regular.formula: sum(mu_vtx, safe_div(ScoutingMuonVtx_trackIso, ScoutingMuonVtx_pt, 99) < 0.15) + sum(mu_novtx, safe_div(ScoutingMuonNoVtx_trackIso, ScoutingMuonNoVtx_pt, 99) < 0.15)

regular.name: nVetoElectron
regular.formula: sum(ele, ((abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) < 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0126 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00463 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.148 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.209 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 2) || (abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) >= 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0457 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00814 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.19 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.132 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 3)) && (safe_div(ScoutingElectron_trackIso + ScoutingElectron_ecalIso + ScoutingElectron_hcalIso, ScoutingElectron_pt, 99) < 0.20))

regular.name: nVetoMuon
regular.formula: sum(mu_vtx, (ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2) && (safe_div(ScoutingMuonVtx_trackIso, ScoutingMuonVtx_pt, 99) < 0.15)) + sum(mu_novtx, (ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2) && (safe_div(ScoutingMuonNoVtx_trackIso, ScoutingMuonNoVtx_pt, 99) < 0.15))

regular.name: nVetoIDElectron_injet
regular.formula: sum(ele_injet, (abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) < 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0126 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00463 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.148 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.209 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 2) || (abs(ScoutingElectron_eta) >= 1.479 && ScoutingElectron_sigmaIetaIeta < 0.0457 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dEtaIn) < 0.00814 && abs(ScoutingElectron_dPhiIn) < 0.19 && ScoutingElectron_hOverE < 0.10 && abs(ScoutingElectron_ooEMOop) < 0.132 && ScoutingElectron_missingHits <= 3))

regular.formula: sum(mu_vtx_injet, ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2) + sum(mu_novtx_injet, ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidStandAloneMuonHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_normchi2 < 3 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nTrackerLayersWithMeasurement > 5 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nValidPixelHits > 0 && ScoutingMuonNoVtx_nRecoMuonMatchedStations >= 2)

regular.formula: sum(mu_vtx_injet, safe_div(ScoutingMuonVtx_trackIso, ScoutingMuonVtx_pt, 99) < 0.15) + sum(mu_novtx_injet, safe_div(ScoutingMuonNoVtx_trackIso, ScoutingMuonNoVtx_pt, 99) < 0.15)
